title: NOA Encrypted Reason
description: The HPKE-AEAD blob carrying the decision reason (D23, F13, §12), encrypted to the TENANT AUDIT key (not the approver device key — so audit export survives device loss). NOT Ed25519-signed and has no signing domain of its own; it is embedded as the Decision Artifact's reasonEncryption field and integrity-protected by the Decision Artifact's own signature over the whole object + the AEAD tag + AAD binding.
